claims.author_quote: Utility capex plans for grid hardening have exploded, up more than 40% in two years.
claims.restatement: US investor-owned utility capital expenditure guidance rose materially (>=40%) between FY2024 and FY2026.

evidence.quote: EEI member companies project record capital expenditures of $XXX billion for 2026.

claims.author_quote: Despite the growth, GRID Corp trades at a discount to the sector.
claims.restatement: GRIDX trades below the electrical-equipment sector median on EV/EBITDA per its latest 10-K figures.

evidence.quote: Total revenues of $4,210 million for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026.

claims.author_quote: The IRA grid money starts flowing this summer.
claims.restatement: Federal grid-modernisation disbursements are scheduled to begin in Q3 2026.

priced_in.expectations_summary: implied FCF CAGR +9.8% (price=100.0, shares=1000000000.0, net_debt=10000000000.0, fcf=5500000000.0, exit_multiple=16.0, years=5, discount=0.1)
priced_in.variant_view: Backlog growth verified at the primary level runs ahead of the single-digit growth the price implies; the market is treating grid capex as cyclical, filings say contracted.

evidence.quote: Free cash flow of $5.5 billion for fiscal 2026.

kill_switches.condition: Q2 report shows backlog down sequentially
